name: CHORIOAMNIONIC SEPARATION
dominant_finding: membrane extends over fetal surface + stops at origin of umbilical cord
discriminating_features: membrane extends over fetal surface + stops at origin of umbilical cord
elevated membrane thinner than chorionic membrane

general: membrane extends over fetal surface + stops at origin of umbilical cord
elevated membrane thinner than chorionic membrane

clinical.Cx: rupture of amniotic membrane → may lead to amniotic band syndrome
